ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: CLOSELY ASSOCIATED - PROVIDE SERVICES FOR THE MANAGEMENT AND OPERATION OF A CORRECTIONAL FACILITY IN ACCORDANCE WITH RFP-PCC-0017. MODIFICATION 0051 REPLACES SOW SECTION G - INFORMATION SYSTEM AND RESEARCH FOR THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
